inclusions: Cocoa beans, whole or broken, raw or roasted
Cocoa shells, husks, skins and other cocoa waste
Cocoa paste (cocoa mass/liquor), whether or not defatted
Cocoa powder, not containing added sugar or other sweetening matter
Cocoa powder containing added sugar or other sweetening matter (heading 18.06)
Chocolate and other food preparations containing cocoa
Chocolate confectionery in blocks, slabs or bars
Food preparations from flour, starch or malt extract containing 40-50% cocoa (defatted basis)
Food preparations from dairy products (04.01-04.04) containing 5-10% cocoa (defatted basis), for infants, not put up for retail sale

exclusions.condition: Food preparations containing more than 20% by weight of sausage, meat, meat offal, blood, insects, fish, crustaceans, molluscs or other aquatic invertebrates
Preparations of heading 19.01 (malt extract, food preparations of flour with cocoa)
Preparations of heading 19.04 (expanded or roasted cereals)
Preparations of heading 19.05 (bread, biscuits, waffles, pastry)
Preparations of heading 21.05 (ice cream and other edible ice)
Preparations of heading 22.02 (waters, including mineral waters and aerated waters, containing added sugar or other sweetening matter or flavoured)
Preparations of heading 22.08 (spirits, liqueurs and other spirituous beverages)

exclusions.action: Redirect to Heading 17.04 (sugar confectionery not containing cocoa)

classification_rules.description: Heading 18.06 covers ALL sugar confectionery containing cocoa AND all other food preparations containing cocoa — subject to the exclusions in Note 1. It is the residual heading for cocoa-containing food products not specifically excluded.
Cocoa powder WITHOUT added sugar or sweetening → 18.05. Cocoa powder WITH added sugar or other sweetening matter → 18.06.10.
Chocolate preparations in blocks, slabs or bars: weight MORE THAN 2 kg → 1806.20; weight 2 kg or less, filled → 1806.31; weight 2 kg or less, not filled → 1806.32.

Food preparations made from dairy products of headings 04.01–04.04, containing 5% or more but not exceeding 10% cocoa (defatted basis), specially prepared for infants or young children, and NOT put up for retail sale → 1806.90.40.
Food preparations of flour, meal, starch or malt extract containing 40% or more but not exceeding 50% cocoa by weight (totally defatted basis) → 1806.90.30.
